query:
SELECT 
  source, 
  COUNT(*) as total_contacts,
  SUM(CASE WHEN lifetime_spend > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_spend_data,
  ROUND(SUM(lifetime_spend), 2) as total_lifetime_spend,
  ROUND(AVG(lifetime_spend), 2) as avg_spend,
  SUM(total_visits) as total_visits
FROM newsletter_subscribers 
GROUP BY source;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2SwVK5NjsaUvPbw.root --database dwDnV2Lj8n7Vbu7KdvRPoj --execute SELECT 
  source, 
  COUNT(*) as total_contacts,
  SUM(CASE WHEN lifetime_spend > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_spend_data,
  ROUND(SUM(lifetime_spend), 2) as total_lifetime_spend,
  ROUND(AVG(lifetime_spend), 2) as avg_spend,
  SUM(total_visits) as total_visits
FROM newsletter_subscribers 
GROUP BY source;
